name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance offers payday loans and cash advances up to $1,000 with same-day funding and acceptance of all credit types at their Detroit location.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical location in Detroit, Michigan, specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions. The company processes payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans through both in-person visits and online applications, with a stated focus on rapid funding for urgent financial needs.

Their service offerings include payday loans (up to $1,000), bad credit loans (up to $50,000), same-day loans, cash advances, and personal loans. All products are marketed as unsecured with no collateral required and acceptance of all credit types. The company emphasizes a fast process with minimal paperwork and funds that can be used for any purpose.

US Cash Advance distinguishes itself through in-person service at their physical Detroit location with extended hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends). Customer reviews highlight fast processing times (under 45 minutes reported), transparent terms, and staff assistance in explaining loan terms. The company advertises a multi-step process involving online inquiry forms, connection to third-party lenders, offer review, contract signing, and cash disbursement.

However, this is a traditional payday lender operating in the high-cost small-loan space. The website lacks transparency on APR, fees, and specific repayment terms. One review mentions receiving only $100 despite applying for a payday loan, suggesting significant limitations on actual loan amounts. The company's emphasis on connecting borrowers to "trusted third-party lenders" indicates they operate as a loan matching service rather than direct lender. No information on loan terms, interest rates, or regulatory compliance details is provided on the website.
pros: Extended service hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends) for working customers
Same-day or next-day funding available according to customer testimonials (money within hours)
Accepts all credit types including bad credit with no credit check options advertised
No collateral required for loans (unsecured lending)
Fast in-person processing reported under 45 minutes by customer
Transparent discussion of terms reported by customers ("upfront" with "no hidden fees")
Accepts borrowers in urgent financial situations with flexible use of funds
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee schedules disclosed on website
Operates as loan matching service connecting to third-party lenders rather than direct lender
Actual loan amounts appear much smaller than advertised (customer received $100 despite applying)
Physical location limited to one Detroit address; online application unclear on service area
Lacks information on repayment terms, loan duration, or rollover policies
best_for: Workers in Detroit needing cash before next paycheck with poor or no credit history
Individuals with urgent expenses ($100-$500 range based on actual amounts) and limited alternatives
Borrowers who prefer in-person service and immediate answers over online-only lenders
diagnosis: Best for Detroit-area workers facing immediate cash shortfalls who cannot access traditional credit and need hands-on service. Critical caveat: APR and actual available loan amounts are not disclosed; customer reports suggest actual loans are substantially smaller than advertised maximums, and this is a high-cost short-term lending product typical of payday loan stores.
